case_title: SEANDA CONLEY VS. YUAN ALBERTO QUINTERO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAY-04-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. PARTIES AGREE THAT A REVISED PAYMENT SCHEDULE HAS BEEN REACHED: DEFENDANT HAS PAID ALL OUTSTANDING BILLS THAT UNDERLIE THE JUDGMENT, DEFENDANT HAS TODAY PAID PLAINTIFF $400, AND DEFENDANT WILL PAY THE ENTIRETY OF THE JUDGMENT BALANCE TOTALING $100 BY THE END OF JUNE 2017. WITH THAT, PLAINTIFF WILL HAVE BEEN MADE WHOLE UNDER THE JUDGMENT. JUDGMENT CREDITOR SEANDA CONLEY APPEARED. JUDGMENT DEBTOR YUAN ALBERT QUINTERO APPEARED AND WAIVED SERVICE. JUDGE PRO TEM: JASON JUNGREIS; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,003.19 FILED BY CONLEY, SEANDA AS TO DEFENDANT QUINTERO, YUAN ALBERTO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-11-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE WAIVED SERVED DEC-05-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT QUINTERO, YUAN ALBERTO
ORDER ON DECLARATION OF DEFAULT IN PAYMENTS (SC-225). THE PAYMENT ORDER ON: JANUARY 12, 2017 IS TERMINATED AND THE BALANCE OF THE JUDGMENT IS COLLECTIBLE.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-11-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-11-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-11-2017 - JUDGMENT.
SC-223 DECLARATION OF DEFAULT IN PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT (ERRONEOUSLY FILED) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONLEY, SEANDA AS TO DEFENDANT QUINTERO, YUAN ALBERTO

SC-223 DECLARATION OF DEFAULT IN PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT (INVALIDATION OF 02-14-17 REMOVED;DEFAULT PAPERWORK - DECLARATION<SC-223> AND RESPONSE<SC-224> MAILED TO ALL PARTIES) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONLEY, SEANDA AS TO DEFENDANT QUINTERO, YUAN ALBERTO
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT QUINTERO, YUAN ALBERTO HEARING SET FOR MAY-04-2017 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE FILED BY CONLEY, SEANDA QUINTERO, YUAN ALBERTO

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONLEY, SEANDA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CONLEY, SEANDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT QUINTERO, YUAN ALBERTO $3,713.19 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,763.19, PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $100.00 TWICE PER MONTH, BEGINNING ON FEBRUARY 3, 2017 AND ON THE 2ND AND 28TH DAY OF EACH MNONTH THEREAFTER UNTIL PAID IN FULL. IF ANY PAYMENT IS MISSED, THE ENTIRE BALANCE BECOMES DUE IMMEDIATELY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
